task_completion.description: SolveSpace application is open and a new sketch is started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace UI is visible with a 2D sketch plane active.

task_completion.description: The profile is drawn as a continuous loop with 7 straight lines and 1 concave arc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A closed loop consisting of a tall vertical back wall, horizontal top, stepped top and bottom edges, and a concave arc connecting the inner steps.

task_completion.description: Dimensions of 90, 60, and 10 are applied to the sketch segments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dimension labels showing '90' (back wall), '60' (ceiling edge), and '10' (steps/drops) are visible on the sketch.

task_completion.description: The concave arc is tangent to the vertical bottom rise line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tangency constraint icon or a smooth, continuous transition between the vertical bottom rise line and the arc.

task_completion.description: The sketch is fully defined without an explicit radius dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace property browser indicates '0 degrees of freedom' or 'ok', and there is no dimension label for the arc's radius.

task_completion.description: The file is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace window title bar displays 'cove_molding.slvs' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application interface with the model being built, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application menus and tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Toolbars, menus, or property panels in SolveSpace are shown being actively used.

integrity.description: The agent did not just write a script or text file to generate the .slvs file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SolveSpace graphical canvas shows the sketch being actively drawn and constrained step-by-step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/cove_molding.slvs. The sketch must contain exactly 7 lines and 1 arc. The expected dimensions to be visible are 90, 60, and 10. The sketch must be fully constrained (0 degrees of freedom) without an explicit radius dimension for the arc.
